project.title: FinanceBuddy AI
project.description: FinanceBuddy AI is an AI-powered personal finance assistant designed to help users manage their finances efficiently. It enables expense tracking, budget planning, savings goal management, spending analysis, bill reminders, and personalized financial recommendations through natural language conversations.

objective.goal: To assist users in managing their personal finances through intelligent budgeting, expense tracking, savings planning, and AI-driven financial insights.

features.name: Savings Goal Planner
features.description: Helps users achieve financial goals with structured savings plans.

features.name: Spending Analytics
features.description: Analyzes spending behavior and highlights improvement opportunities.

features.name: AI Financial Advisor
features.description: Provides personalized budgeting and money-saving suggestions.

features.name: Bill & EMI Reminders
features.description: Keeps users informed about upcoming payments.

features.name: Financial Reports
features.description: Generates summaries of income, expenses, and savings.

features.name: Natural Language Chat
features.description: Allows users to interact using everyday language.

workflow: User enters a financial query or data
sample_prompts: Create a monthly budget for my income.
Help me plan a savings goal.
Set reminders for my upcoming bills.
Give me tips to reduce unnecessary expenses.
